016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.arg;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
022
023import java.util.*;
024
025import org.apache.juneau.commons.*;
026import org.apache.juneau.commons.httppart.*;
027import org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.http.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.marshall.httppart.*;
032import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.*;
033import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.httppart.*;
034
035/**
036 * Resolves method parameters and parameter types annotated with {@link Query} on {@link RestOp}-annotated Java methods.
037 *
038 * <p>
039 * The parameter value is resolved using:
040 * <p class='bjava'>
041 *    <jv>opSession</jv>
042 *       .{@link RestOpSession#getRequest() getRequest}()
043 *       .{@link RestRequest#getQueryParams() getQueryParams}()
044 *       .{@link RequestQueryParamList#get(String) get}(<jv>name</jv>)
045 *       .{@link RequestQueryParam#as(Class) as}(<jv>type</jv>);
046 * </p>
047 *
048 * <p>
049 * {@link HttpPartSchema schema} is derived from the {@link Query} annotation.
050 *
051 * <p>
052 * If the {@link Schema#collectionFormat()} value is {@link HttpPartCollectionFormat#MULTI}, then the data type can be a {@link Collection} or array.
053 *
054 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
055 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/JavaMethodParameters">Java Method Parameters</a>
056 * </ul>
057 */
058public class QueryArg implements RestOpArg {
059
060   private static final AnnotationProvider AP = AnnotationProvider.INSTANCE;
061
062   /**
063    * Static creator.
064    *
065    * @param paramInfo The Java method parameter being resolved.
066    * @param annotations The annotations to apply to any new part parsers.
067    * @return A new {@link QueryArg}, or <jk>null</jk> if the parameter is not annotated with {@link Query}.
068    */
069   public static QueryArg create(ParameterInfo paramInfo, AnnotationWorkList annotations) {
070      if (AP.has(Query.class, paramInfo))
071         return new QueryArg(paramInfo, annotations);
072      return null;
073   }
074
075   private static Optional<String> findName(ParameterInfo pi) {
076      // @formatter:off
077      return AP.find(Query.class, pi)
078         .stream()
079         .map(AnnotationInfo::inner)
080         .filter(x -> isAnyNotBlank(x.value(), x.name()))
081         .findFirst()
082         .map(x -> firstNonBlank(x.name(), x.value()));
083      // @formatter:on
084   }
085
086   private static Optional<String> findDef(ParameterInfo pi) {
087      // @formatter:off
088      return AP.find(Query.class, pi)
089         .stream()
090         .map(AnnotationInfo::inner)
091         .filter(x -> ne(x.def()))
092         .findFirst()
093         .map(Query::def);
094      // @formatter:on
095   }
096
097   private static Query getClassLevelQuery(ParameterInfo pi, String paramName) {
098      var declaringClass = pi.getMethod().getDeclaringClass();
099      if (declaringClass == null)
100         return null;
101      var restAnnotation = declaringClass.getAnnotations(Rest.class).findFirst().map(AnnotationInfo::inner).orElse(null);
102      if (restAnnotation == null)
103         return null;
104      for (var q : restAnnotation.queryParams()) {
105         var qName = firstNonEmpty(q.name(), q.value());
106         if (paramName.equals(qName))
107            return q;
108      }
109      return null;
110   }
111
112   private final boolean multi;
113   private final HttpPartParser partParser;
114   private final HttpPartSchema schema;
115   private final String name;
116   private final String def;
117   private final ClassInfo type;
118
119   /**
120    * Constructor.
121    *
122    * @param pi The Java method parameter being resolved.
123    * @param annotations The annotations to apply to any new part parsers.
124    */
125   protected QueryArg(ParameterInfo pi, AnnotationWorkList annotations) {
126      this.name = findName(pi).orElseThrow(() -> new ArgException(pi, "@Query used without name or value"));
127
128      var classLevelQuery = getClassLevelQuery(pi, name);
129
130      var schemaBuilder = HttpPartSchema.create();
131      if (classLevelQuery != null)
132         schemaBuilder.apply(classLevelQuery);
133      schemaBuilder.applyAll(Query.class, pi);
134      this.schema = schemaBuilder.build();
135
136      this.def = findDef(pi).or(() -> opt(classLevelQuery).filter(q -> ne(q.def())).map(Query::def)).orElse(null);
137      this.type = pi.getParameterType();
138      @SuppressWarnings({
139         "unchecked" // Type erasure on reflective/generic cast; element type is verified at call site
140      })
141      var pp = (Class<? extends HttpPartParser>)schema.getParser();
142      this.partParser = nn(pp) ? HttpPartParser.creator().type(pp).apply(annotations).create() : null;
143      this.multi = schema.getCollectionFormat() == HttpPartCollectionFormat.MULTI;
144
145      if (multi && ! type.isCollectionOrArray())
146         throw new ArgException(pi, "Use of multipart flag on @Query parameter that is not an array or Collection");
147   }
148
149   @SuppressWarnings({
150      "rawtypes", // Raw types necessary for REST argument resolution with generic types
151      "unchecked", // Type erasure requires unchecked casts in REST argument parsing
152   })
153   @Override /* Overridden from RestOpArg */
154   public Object resolve(RestOpSession opSession) throws Exception {
155      var req = opSession.getRequest();
156      var ps = partParser == null ? req.getPartParserSession() : partParser.getPartSession();
157      var rh = req.getQueryParams();
158      var bs = req.getMarshallingSession();
159      var cm = bs.getClassMeta(type.innerType());
160
161      if (multi) {
162         Collection c;
163         if (cm.isArray()) {
164            c = list();
165         } else if (cm.canCreateNewInstance()) {
166            c = (Collection)cm.newInstance();
167         } else {
168            c = new JsonList();
169         }
170         rh.getAll(name).stream().map(x -> x.parser(ps).schema(schema).as(cm.getElementType()).orElse(null)).forEach(c::add);
171         return cm.isArray() ? toArray(c, cm.getElementType().inner()) : c;
172      }
173
174      if (cm.isMapOrBean() && isOneOf(name, "*", "")) {
175         var m = new JsonMap();
176         rh.forEach(e -> m.put(e.getName(), e.parser(ps).schema(schema == null ? null : schema.getProperty(e.getName())).as(cm.getValueType()).orElse(null)));
177         return req.getMarshallingSession().convertToType(m, cm);
178      }
179
180      return rh.getLast(name).parser(ps).schema(schema).def(def).as(type.innerType()).orElse(null);
181   }
182}
